justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times on the same day or the next week, but did not offer a wider range of options or proactively suggest alternative days further out until later in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking the same 8 AM to 10 AM window repeatedly even after the user asked to broaden the search to any available time on specific days, leading to many unproductive turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive apologies and its inability to find any slots, compounded by its failure to broaden the search effectively, making the user repeat the same type of request multiple times.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent struggled significantly with finding an appointment, which was exacerbated by its inefficient search strategy and repetitive responses, leading to a poor customer experience.
